annotations.label: Direct sums/summands of projectives are projective

anchor.snippet: Direct sums and direct summands of projective modules are projective.

annotations.label: Projective is free over a local ring

annotations.label: Idempotent ideals in a product ring are projective not free

anchor.snippet: Over a direct product of rings R × S where R and S are nonzero rings, both R × 0 and 0 × S are non-free projective modules.

annotations.label: Non-principal ideal over a Dedekind domain

anchor.snippet: Over a Dedekind domain a non- principal ideal is always a projective module that is not a free module.

annotations.label: Natural module over a matrix ring

anchor.snippet: Over a matrix ring M n ( R ), the natural module R n is projective but is not free when n > 1.
Over a semisimple ring , every module is projective, but a nonzero proper left (or right) ideal is not a free module.
Every projective module is flat .

annotations.label: Govorov–Lazard: flat = direct limit of f.g. free

anchor.snippet: a module M is flat if and only if it is a direct limit of finitely-generated free modules

annotations.label: Quotients of projectives need not be projective

annotations.label: Category of f.g. projectives is exact

anchor.snippet: The category of finitely generated projective modules over a ring is an exact category .
a projective resolution of M is an infinite exact sequence of modules

annotations.label: Every module has a projective resolution

anchor.snippet: Every module possesses a projective resolution.
A classic example of a projective resolution is given by the Koszul complex of a regular sequence
The length of a finite resolution is the index n such that P n is nonzero
the minimal length among all finite projective resolutions of M is called its projective dimension

annotations.label: Localization of a projective module is projective

anchor.snippet: The localization of a projective module is a projective module over the localized ring.

annotations.label: Projective over local ring is free

anchor.snippet: A projective module over a local ring is free.

annotations.label: Locally free = projective over Noetherian rings

anchor.snippet: a finitely generated module over a commutative Noetherian ring is locally free if and only if it is projective.
